text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Most of the coffee beans that make it<n>into our
cup are either arabica or<n>robusta.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Robusta beans are bitter... and have a<n>unique
flavor. But when you blend them<n>with arabica
beans, they add a nice<n>accent to the flavor.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Every bean can shine given the right<n>
environment... Coffee teaches us<n>kindness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would you like... to join me for a cup?
